5-in-1 Face & Body Sculpting Machine, Gua Sha & Vacuum Cupping Massager
  • 5-in-1 Multifunctional Body Sculpting Machine — combines microcurrent, heat & vibration, suction and red LED light.
  • Suction Massage with Red Light — helps support lymphatic drainage, reduce temporary swelling.
  • Dual Care for Face & Body — designed for both facial and body treatments.

Safe, Effective & Easy to Use. Use with body oil or lotion for smoother glide. Built-in 9-minute auto shut-off ensures safe use.

Brand Story: Professional beauty tools for home and salon use.
